summary: Queue throttling, retry, cancellation, resume, and product evidence writers are implemented. The DF-244 packaged Generate/export smoke now contributes direct packaged app-surface DF-233 queue evidence: the packaged run copied a ready queue JSON, project-folder export, and stored PNG artifact into docs/live-evidence while preserving Codex App Server turn provenance. A latest real Codex OAuth cancellation smoke also ran through the product slide generation queue and rejected a late provider output before storage. DF-233 remains blocked only on packaged queue-control scenarios: genuine 429 or 5xx retry provenance, real-provider user cancellation, and restart-resume evidence proving completed slides are not regenerated.
